channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania reassures investors on national stability and economic resilience after 2025 unrest
item.description: Tanzania’s ruling party leadership has moved to reassure both local and international investors that the country remains stable, united, and open for investment despite brief civil unrest that occurre...

item.title: Kwara Pastor Recounts Deadly Terrorist Attack on Church in Woro Community
item.description: Pastor Adesoji Dada Aderemi of Divine Evangelical Mission Church for Woro, Kwara State, don tell how life scatter for him and him church members during one February 3, 2026 attack. According to the pa...

item.title: First villager rescued after week-long cave flood rescue operation in Laos
item.description: Rescue divers in Laos have successfully evacuated the first of five villagers trapped inside a flooded cave system for more than a week. The incident occurred after the group entered the cave in searc...

item.title: Trump responds to Jill Biden comments about Joe Biden’s debate performance and health concerns
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump responded on Truth Social to recent comments made by former First Lady Jill Biden regarding President Joe Biden’s performance during a 2024 presidential debate. In a...

item.title: Davao Region advances to Palarong Pambansa basketball finals after semifinal win over NCR
item.description: Davao Region’s secondary boys basketball team secured a spot in the Palarong Pambansa finals by defeating the National Capital Region (NCR) in the semifinals on May 29, 2026, at the Datu Lipus Makaond...

item.title: Australian Government Announces Major Overhaul of Workforce Australia and JobSeeker Services
item.description: The Australian Government has unveiled a $312 million reform of its employment services system, affecting over a million Australians on programs like JobSeeker. Minister for Employment and Workplace R...

item.title: Popular Gel Hairstyles for Black Women for Every Occasion
item.description: Gel hairstyles are becoming increasingly popular among black women in Kenya and beyond because they are versatile, stylish, and easy to maintain. Whether your hair is natural, relaxed, short, or long,...

item.title: Kenneth Law pleads guilty to aiding 14 suicides in Ontario, investigation reveals global impact
item.description: Kenneth Law, a Mississauga, Ontario man, has pleaded guilty in a Newmarket court to counselling or aiding suicide in relation to 14 deaths in the province. Law operated online websites that sold toxic...

item.title: Dr Joyce Kindiki impresses at National Prayer Breakfast in blue outfit as netizens praise her stylist
item.description: Dr Joyce Kindiki, the Second Lady of Kenya and wife to Deputy President Kithure Kindiki, attracted widespread attention after attending the National Prayer Breakfast held at Safari Park Hotel in Nairo...

item.title: Taiwan Coast Guard Showcases Its Largest Hospital-Equipped Vessel to Asian Journalists
item.description: The Taiwan Coast Guard recently allowed Asian journalists to tour one of its biggest ships, the CG5002 also known as Hsinchu. This marks the first time such access was granted, highlighting transparen...

item.title: Pam Bondi shifts responsibility to successor during House Epstein files hearing
item.description: During a closed-door hearing with the House Oversight Committee regarding the Justice Department's handling of the Jeffrey Epstein investigation, former Attorney General Pam Bondi appeared to assign a...

item.title: Cripps’ late goal seals Carlton upset over Geelong in MCG thriller
item.description: Carlton have produced a stirring upset over Geelong, holding on for a four-point victory in a high-quality AFL clash at the MCG, with captain Patrick Cripps delivering the decisive moment late in the ...

item.title: Kenyan authorities arrest eight students after deadly boarding school fire kills 16 and injures 79
item.description: Kenyan authorities have arrested eight students suspected of involvement in a fatal arson attack at a girls’ boarding school that left 16 students dead and 79 others injured. The fire broke out in the...

item.title: Ishaq Dar Meets Marco Rubio to Discuss Bilateral Relations and Regional Peace
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar visited Washington on May 29, 2026, where he met with US Secretary of State and National Security Adviser Marco Rubio. The meeting, which included ...

item.title: Sen. Mike Lee Faces Criticism for Accusing Texas Democratic Candidate of Child Sacrifice
item.description: Senator Mike Lee, a Republican from Utah and chair of the Senate Energy and Natural Resources Committee, faced widespread criticism after making inflammatory claims against James Talarico, the Democra...

item.title: Tanzania aims to become global graphite production hub amid rising EV demand
item.description: Tanzania is making strong plans to position itself as one of the leading global producers of graphite, a key mineral used in electric vehicle batteries and various industrial applications. The country...

item.title: Becky Hill criticises Jack Whitehall’s class-related BRIT Awards joke and discusses working-class themes in new album
item.description: Singer Becky Hill has revisited the controversy surrounding comedian Jack Whitehall’s remarks at the 2025 BRIT Awards, where he referred to her as ‘Wetherspoons Whitney’ and mocked her Midlands accent...

item.title: Former DPWH Secretary Manuel Bonoan posts bail for graft case linked to flood control projects
item.description: Former Public Works Secretary Manuel Bonoan has posted a P90,000 bail at the Sandiganbayan Second Division on Friday to temporarily secure his freedom while facing a graft charge. The case involves al...

item.title: Rescue underway after villagers trapped in flooded Laos cave; first survivor brought out safely
item.description: Rescue teams in Laos have successfully evacuated the first of five villagers who were trapped inside a flooded cave system for more than a week following heavy rain and flash flooding. The operation, ...

item.title: How to Make a Classic Paloma Cocktail for Any Occasion
item.description: The Paloma cocktail, renowned for its light, citrusy, and crisp flavour, is traditionally associated with summer but can be savoured year-round, especially to mark World Paloma Day. Although this cele...
